name: Dungeon Battles
short_description: Struggling to survive in the dungeon!
detailed_description:
-Challenge the Dungeon alone, challenge countless characters corrupted by the Dungeon.

-The dungeon is full of randomness, and every new game will be a new experience.

-Defeat monsters with minimal cost through strategy

-Enhance your combat effectiveness in the dungeon through various random events.

-Choose high risk and high return, or proceed cautiously?

-Every choice may affect whether you go further or not.

-Continuously fighting to obtain spoils of war.

-Or avoid combat and search for treasure chests and wandering merchants

-Continuously improve oneself and challenge powerful BOSS

-6 unique BOSS.Defeating the boss will result in stronger runes

-More than 100 Runes that can be found.

-More than 50 completely different battles.

-You must constantly improve yourself.

-Stay stronger and challenge more floors.
